feed.title: SAP Community - Artificial Intelligence
feed.subtitle: Artificial Intelligence Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Questions answering methods other than Chatbots
entry.content:
Hi there,

I'm working on my thesis, where I have to build a smart question answering App.

It should be something similar to what you have here.

In our App customers ask questions and give feedbacks. We want to find a way to answer the similar asked questions that are not 100% the same but have the same answer automatically.

I want to use Machine Learning (Or maybe another more efficient way if existed) so the questions which we already have answers to in the database will be answered automatically.

I want to see if there is any other, maybe easier or maybe more efficient way than Chatbots

entry.title: Questions answering/suggesting methods
entry.content:
Hi there,

I'm working on my thesis, where I have to build a smart question answering App.

Precisely what I need, the feature “Questions that might be similar to yours” that is implemented in the Ask a Question page is. (Not Chatbots)

I want to use Machine Learning, so the questions which we already have answers to in the database will be shown as similar asked questions.

Kind regards,

Batoul

entry.title: How to Handle Command Prompt and Write Own Code In Command Prompt In SAP IRPA?
entry.content:
Hello,

I can able to open command prompt through SAP IRPA but after I can't able to write any Code in Command Prompt Text Area through SAP IRPA. I gave criteria and everything Correct Only. For that here I attached the workflow and script area Screen Shot's also. I want to achieve this in Desktop Studio. please provide any blogs to understand and overcome from this.

Thanks in Advance,

Narenthiran Annamalai.

entry.title: Synchronization of AI Core app with GIT repo
entry.content:
I have configured SAP AI Core but pushed code to GIT Hub is not synchronized. How to debug it or check error logs?

Below response from {{apiurl}}/v2/admin/applications/{{app}}/status

{ "healthStatus": "Healthy", "message": "Unknown", "reconciledAt": "2022-02-28T11:08:43Z", "source": { "path": "Unknown", "repoURL": "Unknown", "revision": "Unknown" }, "syncFinishedAt": "Unknown", "syncRessourcesStatus": [], "syncStartedAt": "Unknown", "syncStatus": "Unknown"}

entry.title: What is purpose of "resultset" artifact kind in SAP AI Core?
entry.content: What is purpose of "resultset" artifacts in SAP AI Core? I would like to generate images in S3 bucket as output of ML workflow. Should we use "dataset" or "resultset" as output artifact? There is documentation about use case for result set.

entry.title: SAP Commisson - Do we have ML model for predict and forecast the business
entry.content:
Hi,

We are using the SAP Commission module - any module is there that integrate with SAP commission and provide the forecast of business/sales.

entry.title: Is there an AI service from SAP that can take documents (invoices) and read them?
entry.content:
I come form the SAP business one world and saw last year that it is possible with BTP to scan a PDF invoice and save it as an AP invoice. Does S/4HANA have that as a capability. Not just invoices but any document type as we are looking at the possibilities of what is possible.

SAP Business One Integration with Document Information Extraction service enhancements | SAP Blogs

SAP Business One and Artificial Intelligence | SAP Blogs

Best Practices for Intelligent Automation for SAP Business One | SAP Blogs

Digital Transformation and its importance to becoming an Intelligent Enterprise with SAP Business One | SAP Blogs

SAP Business Technology Platform for SAP Business One | SAP Blogs

SAP Business One – Automated Invoice Recognition (Proof of Concept) - YouTube

entry.title: How does artificial intelligence function?
entry.content: Artificial intelligence (AI) is the study of how robots replicate or mimic human intelligence, so clarify briefly how it functions and enable by several technologies.

entry.title: openAI and SAP BTP
entry.content: Is it possible to use the tools from openAI as we are part of RISE implementation and building a team for our SAP s/4HANA setup?

entry.title: Relationship Map in S4/Hana
entry.content:
Hi,

We want look like's Attached file - Relationship mapping on SAP-Business One,

Do you know! Is it possible for find the Procure-to-pay process flow on S4/Hana?

Regards

Butterfly" Vasanth

entry.title: goggle authorization
entry.content:
screenshot-3056.png

I am facing the error while i am performing the task Extract Using Processor

I have assigned all the roles and api but still facing the issue in the connection it is showing like

PERMISSION_DENIED: Permission 'documentai.processors.processOnline' denied on resource '
attached the screenshot of the error

entry.title: AI for answering users' comments under Social Media posts
entry.content: Hello, I wanted to ask if SAP provides AI tools that directly comment users' interactions under SM posts. Like a Chatbot, but that the AI looks for interactions under posts and answers them. Thanks

entry.title: CO2Inverter Tutorial
entry.content:
hey, i'm currently doing this tutorial and need help because if i run the code it doesnt really work. For me its also not clear where i get the API_Key and how I get the ai deployment ID and in general how and where i deploy the Azure Model. Could someone please help me. I'm really really new in this topic but very intrested and motivated to learn more but at the moment i'm just kinda stuck.

For me the 1.)OpenAI_Base 2.) ai deployment ID 3.) ENGINE and the 4.)API_KEY to connect with the mobile app etc are missing and i'm not clear how and where to get them..

Thank you so much for you're help.

The tutorial link would be https://github.com/SAP-samples/azure-openai-aicore-cap-api

entry.title: How to make connection between SAP HANA , SAP AI Core using Cloud Connector?
entry.content:
Hi ,

I have a requirement where my tabular data is in sap hana and i want to load it from there and utilize for an AI Scenario in SAP AI Core using Cloud Connector as mediator between them. Kindly share the suggestion along with a detailed example . Thanks

entry.title: Getting requirements to build wheel did not run successfully for sap aicore
entry.content:
Hi all , I am following a blog to build meter reading model through sap ai core , while installing sap ai core sdk content package it is showing error , please help how to resolve

Blog : https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/cv-package-aicore-setup.html#3ff505bb-3988-4607-8b39-6bbfb9bd175f

entry.title: Platform updates to SF AI features needed
entry.content: As a long-time administrator of the SF system I feel that the biggest bang for your time is to update the core features of SF with your AI functionality to not only sell your product, but enhance your current users' experience. Simple updates like better search prediction, name prediction, predictive text in ALL picklist fields are ways to really get this product to step up to where its competitors are and help us users feel that the AI features are useful all around not just selectively placed.

entry.title: Queries on SAP LLM and Joule?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are looking to enable Joule. However before doing so, we want to understand more about following question. Please share your thoughts on these questions.

1. Which LLM model is SAP using? Is it homegrown or Other models like GPT, BERT or LLAMA?

2. How is SAP addressing the hallucination issues?

3. Any other terms and condition that SAP want Client to accept in order to use Gen AI/Joule?
4. Is same LLM used in various modules or different LLM used ? For example for Job description one LLM, For SF chatboat another LLM model?
5. What are the update cadence for the SAP LLM Product like schedule release or Adhoc release?

6 .Where does this LLM resides and size of custom SAP LLM?

7. Once Joule is enabled, can we turn On/Off depending on modules?

entry.title: Training the SAP AI Model with SAP Help Documents
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a requirement for building a chatbot that is trained with SAP Internal Help document.

I have a parent link and in turn the parent link navigates to various sub links.

We want our AI model to be trained with all the data available from the parent link and the sub links.

How can we achieve this ? is there an out of the box integration techniques available for this purpose ?

Thanks,

Santhosini

entry.title: SAP S4 HANA - AI features for Category Management
entry.content:
What AI features can be used to help in category management in SAP S4 HANA MM? Can it be integrated to a assistant which can search market insights for the category?

Can it give insights?

Can it perform some analysis like SWOT analysis to help derive a strategy?

Which version on SAP S4 HANA can do? Can it be done on On prem?

Thanks,

Mrunal

entry.title: Unavailability of AI Core and AI Launchpad in discovery center
entry.content:
Is there a reason that the SAP AI Core and SAP AI launchpad are not showing up in the discovery center?

These services show up as free tier in the SAP Discovery Center. But when I try to add this service in my sub account, it does not show up as a service plan for my account.

Can anyone help me with this? I am facing this error while trying to follow the following tutorial. Also another tutorial.
Thanks!
